pageContext.name: Batwoman
pageContext.description: That bat they shine in the sky … civilians think it's a call for help. The bad guys think it's a warning.   Sideshow Art Prints and Alex Ross Art present the Batwoman Fine Art Lithograph, a dramatic DC Comics art print for fans of the Bat-Family.  Gotham City criminals have a new face to fear with Batwoman on the case! In a flash of red, Kate Kane descends from the rooftops, ready to face crime with her own tactical brand of justice. Batwoman uses her supernatural appearance to spread superstition through Gotham's underworld, working from the shadows like her cousin Bruce Wayne. Alex Ross captures this striking crimefighting persona as her cape cuts sharply through the gloom to confront the real darkness in her city.   Originally created as a variant cover for Detective Comics #860 (2009), written by Greg Rucka for DC Comics, this comic book collectible is now being offered for fans in a fine art format. Each Batwoman Fine Art Lithograph is hand-signed by Alex Ross and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 150 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this super hero wall art makes a perfect cousin to any Batman artwork collection.  Take wing with Kate Kane and bring home the Batwoman Fine Art Lithograph by Alex Ross today!
